subject: [PATCH nfs-utils v2 01/16] nfsdctl: move *_netlink.h to support/include/

2026-03-30.patch_summary: This patch moves the *_netlink.h header files from the nfsdctl directory to the support/include directory, making them available for use by other components. This change is achieved without requiring any source-level #include changes due to the support/include directory being already in the default include path.
